scene: A stern whistle-blowing coach figure pointing and barking at a small doodle stick figure who cowers, a giant unrolled to-do list towering behind them. Flat warm orange background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Three floating items each stamped with a big red X: a long to-do list, a ticking stopwatch, and a tiny grind treadmill. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A surprised doodle stick figure looking at a soft glowing little heart floating gently in its open palm, warm light around it. Flat soft pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure gently patting its own shoulder with a small relieved smile, a soft glow around it, a faint question mark still hovering above. Flat calm green background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
